name: 赘婿候选人们

appearance.face: 相貌出众，各有斯文或俊秀之态
appearance.distinguishing_features: 作为群像存在，衬托沈词的危机感

visual_reference: Several handsome ancient Chinese young men in elegant Jiangnan robes, refined and gentle, warm courtyard family scene

relationships.dynamic: 作为她人生新选择的象征
